description: CAD OS Layer M02 golden-fixture manifest. Pins the live, real artifacts the smoke/integration tests assert against. Counts are the cross-engine ground truth for the golden DWG (21747 modelspace entities). Paths are relative to the repo root (D:\dev\99_tools\autocad-sdk-router). A test treats any missing path as a SKIP (with reason), never a failure.

golden_dwg.role: READ-ONLY original; truth = 21747 modelspace entities. Tests stage their own copy and NEVER write this path.
